questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司推出了 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體。大多數資料庫連接來自無伺服器應用程式。資料庫的應用程式流量以隨機間隔顯著變化。在需求量很大時，用戶報告他們的應用程式遇到資料庫連線拒絕錯誤。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷解決此問題？
question_text.en: A company has launched an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. Most of the connections to the database come from serverless applications. Application traffic to the database changes significantly at random intervals. At times of high demand, users report that their applications experience database connection rejection errors. Which solution will resolve this issue with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在 RDS 代理程式中建立代理程式。設定使用者的應用程式以透過 RDS Proxy 使用資料庫執行個體。
A.en: Create a proxy in RDS Proxy. Configure the users’ applications to use the DB instance through RDS Proxy.

B.zh: 在使用者應用程式和資料庫執行個體之間部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached。
B.en: Deploy Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached between the users’ applications and the DB instance.

C.zh: 將資料庫執行個體移轉到具有更高 I/O 容量的不同實例類別。配置使用者的應用程式以使用新的資料庫實例。
C.en: Migrate the DB instance to a different instance class that has higher I/O capacity. Configure the users’ applications to use the new DB instance.

D.zh: 為資料庫執行個體配置多可用區。配置使用者的應用程式以在資料庫實例之間切換。
D.en: Configure Multi-AZ for the DB instance. Configure the users’ applications to switch between the DB instances.

A.zh: 正確。RDS Proxy 可以管理資料庫連線池、減少連線開銷並提高應用程式可擴充性。特別適合處理動態流量變化和高並發場景，同時運行開銷較低。
A.en: Correct. RDS Proxy can manage database connection pools, reduce connection overhead and improve application scalability. It is particularly suitable for handling dynamic traffic changes and high concurrency scenarios, while having low operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。ElastiCache主要用於快取數據，以減少資料庫查詢次數。不過問題並沒有提到查詢效能問題，而是提到資料庫連線被拒絕的問題。此選項不直接解決連線管理問題。
B.en: Incorrect. ElastiCache is mainly used to cache data to reduce the number of database queries. However, the question does not mention the query performance problem, but the problem of database connection being refused. This option does not directly address connection management issues.

C.zh: 錯誤。升級實例類型可以提高效能，但不能解決連線管理問題。在高並發場景下，連線數的限制仍然存在，操作開銷較高。
C.en: Incorrect. Upgrading the instance type improves performance but does not resolve connection management issues. In high concurrency scenarios, the limit on the number of connections still exists, and the operation overhead is high.

D.zh: 錯誤。Multi-AZ主要用於提高資料庫的高可用性和容災能力，而不是優化連接管理。此選項不能解決連線被拒絕的問題。
D.en: Incorrect. Multi-AZ is mainly used to improve the high availability and disaster recovery capabilities of the database, rather than optimizing connection management. This option does not resolve connection refused issues.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 RDS 代理程式中建立代理程式。設定使用者的應用程式以透過 RDS Proxy 使用資料庫執行個體。
answer_text.en: A. Create a proxy in RDS Proxy. Configure the users’ applications to use the DB instance through RDS Proxy.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：RDS Proxy 可以管理資料庫連線池、減少連線開銷並提高應用程式可擴充性。特別適合處理動態流量變化和高並發場景，同時運行開銷較低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: RDS Proxy can manage database connection pools, reduce connection overhead and improve application scalability. It is particularly suitable for handling dynamic traffic changes and high concurrency scenarios, while having low operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近部署了一個新的審核系統，以集中有關 Amazon EC2 執行個體的作業系統版本、修補和已安裝軟體的資訊。解決方案架構師必須確保透過 EC2 Auto Scaling 群組配置的所有執行個體在啟動和終止後立即成功將報告傳送至審核系統。哪一種解決方案最有效地實現這些目標？
question_text.en: A company recently deployed a new auditing system to centralize information about operating system versions, patching, and installed software for Amazon EC2 instances. A solutions architect must ensure all instances provisioned through EC2 Auto Scaling groups successfully send reports to the auditing system as soon as they are launched and terminated. Which solution achieves these goals MOST efficiently?

A.zh: 使用計劃的 AWS Lambda 函數並在所有 EC2 執行個體上遠端執行腳本以將資料傳送至審核系統。
A.en: Use a scheduled AWS Lambda function and run a script remotely on all EC2 instances to send data to the audit system.

B.zh: 使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 生命週期掛鉤執行自訂腳本，以便在執行個體啟動和終止時將資料傳送至審核系統。
B.en: Use EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to run a custom script to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated.

C.zh: 使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 啟動設定透過使用者資料執行自訂腳本，以便在啟動和終止執行個體時將資料傳送至審核系統。
C.en: Use an EC2 Auto Scaling launch configuration to run a custom script through user data to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated.

D.zh: 在實例作業系統上執行自訂腳本以將資料傳送至審核系統。配置執行個體啟動和終止時 EC2 Auto Scaling 群組要呼叫的腳本。
D.en: Run a custom script on the instance operating system to send data to the audit system. Configure the script to be invoked by the EC2 Auto Scaling group when the instance starts and is terminated.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項雖然Lambda函數可以定期運行腳本，但它並不能保證實例啟動和停止時立即發送資料。這種方法效率低下，無法滿足題目的即時性要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use a scheduled AWS Lambda function and run the script remotely on all EC2 instances to send data to the audit system. Although the Lambda function can run the script periodically, it does not ensure that data is sent immediately when the instance starts and stops. This method is inefficient and cannot meet the real-time requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。此選項生命週期掛鉤允許在啟動和停止實例時執行自訂操作。這是實現資料即時傳輸的最佳方式，滿足問題的要求。
B.en: Correct. Use EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to run custom scripts to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated. Lifecycle hooks allow custom actions to be performed when an instance is started and stopped. This is the best way to achieve real-time data transmission and meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 啟動設定來執行包含使用者資料的自訂腳本，並在啟動和終止執行個體時將資料傳送至審核系統。使用者資料只在實例啟動時運行，實例停止時無法進行操作，因此無法滿足問題要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Use EC2 Auto Scaling launch configuration to run custom scripts with user data and send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated. User data only runs when the instance is started and cannot perform operations when the instance is stopped, so it cannot meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。在實例作業系統上執行自訂腳本以將資料傳送至審核系統。配置此腳本以在啟動和終止執行個體時由 EC2 Auto Scaling 群組呼叫。 EC2 Auto Scaling 群組本身無法直接呼叫執行個體操作的腳本。這需要藉助生命週期鉤子或其他機制來實現。
D.en: Incorrect. Run a custom script on the instance operating system to send data to the audit system. Configure this script to be called by the EC2 Auto Scaling group when instances are launched and terminated. The EC2 Auto Scaling group itself cannot directly invoke scripts on instance operations. This needs to be achieved with the help of life cycle hooks or other mechanisms.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 EC2 Auto Scaling 生命週期掛鉤執行自訂腳本，以便在執行個體啟動和終止時將資料傳送至審核系統。
answer_text.en: B. Use EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to run a custom script to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項生命週期掛鉤允許在啟動和停止實例時執行自訂操作。這是實現資料即時傳輸的最佳方式，滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use EC2 Auto Scaling lifecycle hooks to run custom scripts to send data to the audit system when instances are launched and terminated. Lifecycle hooks allow custom actions to be performed when an instance is started and stopped. This is the best way to achieve real-time data transmission and meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發一款即時多人遊戲，該遊戲使用 UDP 在 Auto Scaling 群組中的客戶端和伺服器之間進行通訊。預計白天的需求會激增，因此遊戲伺服器平臺必須做出相應調整。開發人員希望將玩家分數和其他非關聯式資料儲存在無需幹預即可擴展的資料庫解決方案中。解決方案架構師應該推薦哪一種解決方案？
question_text.en: A company is developing a real-time multiplayer game that uses UDP for communications between the client and servers in an Auto Scaling group. Spikes in demand are anticipated during the day, so the game server platform must adapt accordingly. Developers want to store gamer scores and other non-relational data in a database solution that will scale without intervention. Which solution should a solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Route 53 進行流量分配，使用 Amazon Aurora Serverless 進行資料儲存。
A.en: Use Amazon Route 53 for traffic distribution and Amazon Aurora Serverless for data storage.

B.zh: 使用網路負載平衡器進行流量分配，並使用 Amazon DynamoDB 按需進行資料儲存。
B.en: Use a Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon DynamoDB on-demand for data storage.

C.zh: 使用網路負載平衡器進行流量分配，使用 Amazon Aurora Global Database 進行資料儲存。
C.en: Use a Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon Aurora Global Database for data storage.

D.zh: 使用 Application Load Balancer 進行流量分配，使用 Amazon DynamoDB 全域表進行資料儲存。
D.en: Use an Application Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon DynamoDB global tables for data storage.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Route 53 是一項 DNS 服務，而非負載平衡器，且不提供所需的 UDP 負載平衡。 Aurora Serverless 雖然可以自動擴展，但它是關聯式資料庫，不適合儲存非關係型資料（例如遊戲比分）。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon Route 53 is a DNS service, not a load balancer, and does not provide the required UDP load balancing. Although Aurora Serverless can automatically expand, it is a relational database and is not suitable for storing non-relational data (such as game scores).

B.zh: 正確。網路負載平衡器支援UDP協議，非常適合即時通訊需求。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一個非關聯式資料庫，支援按需擴展，適合儲存分數等非關聯式資料。
B.en: Correct. Network Load Balancer supports UDP protocol, which is very suitable for real-time communication needs. Amazon DynamoDB is a non-relational database that supports on-demand expansion and is suitable for storing scores and other non-relational data.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然 Network Load Balancer 支援 UDP 協議，但 Amazon Aurora Global Database 是關聯式資料庫，不適合儲存非關聯式資料（例如遊戲分數）。
C.en: Incorrect. Although Network Load Balancer supports UDP protocol, Amazon Aurora Global Database is a relational database and is not suitable for storing non-relational data (such as game scores).

D.zh: 錯誤。Application Load Balancer不支援UDP協議，僅支援HTTP/HTTPS協議，不適合即時應用的通訊需求。雖然 DynamoDB 全域表適合儲存非關聯式數據，但負載平衡器的選擇卻不適合。
D.en: Incorrect. Application Load Balancer does not support the UDP protocol and only supports the HTTP/HTTPS protocol, which is not suitable for the communication needs of real-time applications. Although DynamoDB global tables are suitable for storing non-relational data, the choice of load balancer is not.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用網路負載平衡器進行流量分配，並使用 Amazon DynamoDB 按需進行資料儲存。
answer_text.en: B. Use a Network Load Balancer for traffic distribution and Amazon DynamoDB on-demand for data storage.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：網路負載平衡器支援UDP協議，非常適合即時通訊需求。 Amazon DynamoDB 是一個非關聯式資料庫，支援按需擴展，適合儲存分數等非關聯式資料。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Network Load Balancer supports UDP protocol, which is very suitable for real-time communication needs. Amazon DynamoDB is a non-relational database that supports on-demand expansion and is suitable for storing scores and other non-relational data.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司託管一個前端應用程序，該應用程式使用與 AWS Lambda 整合的 Amazon API Gateway API 後端。當 API 收到請求時，Lambda 函數會載入許多函式庫。然後，Lambda 函數連接到 Amazon RDS 資料庫，處理數據，並將數據傳回前端應用程式。該公司希望確保所有用戶的回應延遲盡可能低，同時對公司營運的變更最少。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a frontend application that uses an Amazon API Gateway API backend that is integrated with AWS Lambda. When the API receives requests, the Lambda function loads many libraries. Then the Lambda function connects to an Amazon RDS database, processes the data, and returns the data to the frontend application. The company wants to ensure that response latency is as low as possible for all its users with the fewest number of changes to the company's operations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在前端應用程式和資料庫之間建立連接，以繞過 API 來加快查詢速度。
A.en: Establish a connection between the frontend application and the database to make queries faster by bypassing the API.

B.zh: 為處理請求的 Lambda 函數配置預置並發。
B.en: Configure provisioned concurrency for the Lambda function that handles the requests.

C.zh: 在 Amazon S3 中快取查詢結果，以便更快地檢索類似資料集。
C.en: Cache the results of the queries in Amazon S3 for faster retrieval of similar datasets.

D.zh: 增加資料庫的大小以增加 Lambda 一次可以建立的連線數。
D.en: Increase the size of the database to increase the number of connections Lambda can establish at one time.

A.zh: 錯誤。在前端應用程式和資料庫之間建立連線以繞過API以加快查詢速度。直接連接前端應用程式和資料庫會繞過API Gateway和Lambda的邏輯處理層，破壞現有的架構設計，並可能導致安全性問題和複雜性增加。
A.en: Incorrect. Establish a connection between the front-end application and the database to bypass the API to speed up queries. Directly connecting front-end applications and databases will bypass the logical processing layer of API Gateway and Lambda, destroy the existing architecture design, and may lead to security issues and increased complexity.

B.zh: 正確。為處理請求的 Lambda 函數配置預先配置並發。配置並發可以減少 Lambda 函數的冷啟動時間，從而減少反應延遲。這是對現有架構進行最小改動的情況下解決問題的最佳方式。
B.en: Correct. Configure provisioned concurrency for the Lambda function that handles requests. Provisioning concurrency can reduce the cold start time of a Lambda function, thereby reducing response latency. This is the best way to solve the problem with minimal changes to the existing architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。將查詢結果快取到 Amazon S3 中，以便更快地檢索類似資料集。雖然快取可以提高效能，但是問題沒有提到查詢結果是重複的或可以快取。此外，使用 S3 作為快取需要額外的開發工作和對現有架構的變更。
C.en: Incorrect. Cache query results into Amazon S3 for faster retrieval of similar data sets. Although caching can improve performance, the question does not mention that query results are duplicated or can be cached. Additionally, using S3 as a cache requires additional development work and changes to the existing architecture.

D.zh: 錯誤。增加資料庫大小以增加 Lambda 可以建立的同時連線數。增加資料庫大小並不會直接減少Lambda函數的冷啟動時間，也不會顯著減少反應延遲。
D.en: Incorrect. Increase the database size to increase the number of simultaneous connections Lambda can establish. Increasing the database size does not directly reduce the cold start time of the Lambda function, nor does it significantly reduce response latency.

answer_text.zh: B. 為處理請求的 Lambda 函數配置預置並發。
answer_text.en: B. Configure provisioned concurrency for the Lambda function that handles the requests.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：為處理請求的 Lambda 函數配置預先配置並發。配置並發可以減少 Lambda 函數的冷啟動時間，從而減少反應延遲。這是對現有架構進行最小改動的情況下解決問題的最佳方式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure provisioned concurrency for the Lambda function that handles requests. Provisioning concurrency can reduce the cold start time of a Lambda function, thereby reducing response latency. This is the best way to solve the problem with minimal changes to the existing architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將其本地工作負載遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司已使用多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體和 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體。該公司需要一個能夠在工作時間之外自動啟動和停止 EC2 執行個體和資料庫執行個體的解決方案。此解決方案必須最大限度地減少成本和基礎設施維護。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its on-premises workload to the AWS Cloud. The company already uses several Amazon EC2 instances and Amazon RDS DB instances. The company wants a solution that automatically starts and stops the EC2 instances and DB instances outside of business hours. The solution must minimize cost and infrastructure maintenance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用彈性調整大小來擴展 EC2 執行個體。在工作時間之外將資料庫執行個體擴展到零。
A.en: Scale the EC2 instances by using elastic resize. Scale the DB instances to zero outside of business hours.

B.zh: 探索 AWS Marketplace 尋找合作夥伴解決方案，這些解決方案將按計畫自動啟動和停止 EC2 執行個體和資料庫執行個體。
B.en: Explore AWS Marketplace for partner solutions that will automatically start and stop the EC2 instances and DB instances on a schedule.

C.zh: 啟動另一個 EC2 執行個體。配置 crontab 計劃來執行 shell 腳本，這些腳本將按計劃啟動和停止現有 EC2 執行個體和資料庫執行個體。
C.en: Launch another EC2 instance. Configure a crontab schedule to run shell scripts that will start and stop the existing EC2 instances and DB instances on a schedule.

D.zh: 建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數來啟動和停止 EC2 執行個體和資料庫執行個體。配置 Amazon EventBridge 以按計畫呼叫 Lambda 函數。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that will start and stop the EC2 instances and DB instances. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function on a schedule.

A.zh: 錯誤。EC2執行個體不支援「彈性調整」功能，無法縮放至零。 RDS執行個體也可以直接無條帶擴充到零，只有Aurora Serverless支援暫停功能。
A.en: Incorrect. EC2 instances do not support the "elastic adjustment" function and cannot scale to zero. RDS instances can also be directly scaled to zero without stripes, and only Aurora Serverless supports the pause function.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然AWS Marketplace可能有相關的解決方案，但這會增加額外的成本和複雜性，不符合「最小化成本和基礎設施維護」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Although the AWS Marketplace may have relevant solutions, this will add additional cost and complexity and does not meet the requirements of "minimizing costs and infrastructure maintenance".

C.zh: 錯誤。使用額外的 EC2 執行個體執行 crontab 腳本會增加基礎設施維護成本，且不符合「最小化成本和基礎設施維護」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Using additional EC2 instances to run crontab scripts will increase infrastructure maintenance costs and does not meet the requirements of "minimizing costs and infrastructure maintenance".

D.zh: 正確。AWS Lambda 無伺服器、低成本且免維護。 EventBridge可以依照計畫觸發Lambda函數，完美滿足問題需求。
D.en: Correct. AWS Lambda is serverless, low-cost, and maintenance-free. EventBridge can trigger Lambda functions according to plans, perfectly meeting the problem requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數來啟動和停止 EC2 執行個體和資料庫執行個體。配置 Amazon EventBridge 以按計畫呼叫 Lambda 函數。
answer_text.en: D. Create an AWS Lambda function that will start and stop the EC2 instances and DB instances. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the Lambda function on a schedule.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Lambda 無伺服器、低成本且免維護。 EventBridge可以依照計畫觸發Lambda函數，完美滿足問題需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Lambda is serverless, low-cost, and maintenance-free. EventBridge can trigger Lambda functions according to plans, perfectly meeting the problem requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司託管一個包含 PostgreSQL 資料庫的三層 Web 應用程式。資料庫儲存文檔的元資料。該公司在元資料中搜尋關鍵術語，以檢索該公司每月在報告中審查的文件。這些文件儲存在 Amazon S3 中。這些文件通常只編寫一次，但會經常更新。使用關係查詢，報告過程需要幾個小時。報告過程不得阻止任何文件修改或新增文件。解決方案架構師需要實施解決方案來加快報告流程。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的應用程式程式碼變更來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a three-tier web application that includes a PostgreSQL database. The database stores the metadata from documents. The company searches the metadata for key terms to retrieve documents that the company reviews in a report each month. The documents are stored in Amazon S3. The documents are usually written only once, but they are updated frequently. The reporting process takes a few hours with the use of relational queries. The reporting process must not prevent any document modifications or the addition of new documents. A solutions architect needs to implement a solution to speed up the reporting process. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of change to the application code?

A.zh: 設定一個包含唯讀副本的新 Amazon DocumentDB（相容於 MongoDB）叢集。縮放只讀副本以產生報告。
A.en: Set up a new Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) cluster that includes a read replica. Scale the read replica to generate the reports.

B.zh: 設定包含 Aurora 副本的新 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫叢集。向 Aurora 副本發出查詢以產生報告。
B.en: Set up a new Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster that includes an Aurora Replica. Issue queries to the Aurora Replica to generate the reports.

C.zh: 設定新的 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 多可用區資料庫執行個體。配置上報模組查詢輔助RDS節點，使上報模組不會影響主節點。
C.en: Set up a new Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL Multi-AZ DB instance. Configure the reporting module to query the secondary RDS node so that the reporting module does not affect the primary node.

D.zh: 設定一個新的 Amazon DynamoDB 表格來儲存文件。使用固定的寫入容量來支援新的文件條目。自動擴展讀取容量以支援報告。
D.en: Set up a new Amazon DynamoDB table to store the documents. Use a fixed write capacity to support new document entries. Automatically scale the read capacity to support the reports.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DocumentDB 是 NoSQL 資料庫，與 PostgreSQL 不相容。遷移到 DocumentDB 需要對應用程式程式碼進行大量更改。該問題至少需要進行最少的程式碼更改，並且遷移到 DocumentDB 將涉及資料模型和查詢語言的更改。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon DocumentDB is a NoSQL database and is not compatible with PostgreSQL. Migrating to DocumentDB requires extensive changes to the application code. The question requires at least a minimum code change, and migrating to DocumentDB will involve changes to the data model and query language.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 支援讀寫分離，Aurora Replica 可用於處理唯讀查詢（例如報告產生），以減少主資料庫的負載。 Aurora PostgreSQL 與現有 PostgreSQL 資料庫相容，實現低遷移成本和最少的程式碼變更。
B.en: Correct. Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL supports read-write separation, and Aurora Replica can be used to process read-only queries (such as report generation) to reduce the load on the main database. Aurora PostgreSQL is compatible with existing PostgreSQL databases, resulting in low migration costs and minimal code changes.

C.zh: 錯誤。RDS多可用區輔助節點為熱備節點，僅用於故障切換，無法連線查詢。此選項不足以產生報告，因為輔助節點無法處理讀取請求。
C.en: Incorrect. The auxiliary node of RDS Multi-AZ is a hot standby node, which is only used for failover and cannot be connected for query. This option is not sufficient for report generation because the secondary node cannot handle read requests.

D.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB 是 NoSQL 資料庫，與 PostgreSQL 不相容。遷移到 DynamoDB 需要對應用程式程式碼進行大量變更。該問題至少需要最少的程式碼更改，並且遷移到 DynamoDB 將涉及資料模型和查詢語言的更改。
D.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB is a NoSQL database and is not compatible with PostgreSQL. Migrating to DynamoDB requires extensive changes to the application code. The question requires at least a minimum code change, and migrating to DynamoDB will involve changes to the data model and query language.

answer_text.zh: B. 設定包含 Aurora 副本的新 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫叢集。向 Aurora 副本發出查詢以產生報告。
answer_text.en: B. Set up a new Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster that includes an Aurora Replica. Issue queries to the Aurora Replica to generate the reports.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (96%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 支援讀寫分離，Aurora Replica 可用於處理唯讀查詢（例如報告產生），以減少主資料庫的負載。 Aurora PostgreSQL 與現有 PostgreSQL 資料庫相容，實現低遷移成本和最少的程式碼變更。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (96%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL supports read-write separation, and Aurora Replica can be used to process read-only queries (such as report generation) to reduce the load on the main database. Aurora PostgreSQL is compatible with existing PostgreSQL databases, resulting in low migration costs and minimal code changes.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上有一個三層應用程序，該應用程式從用戶的裝置中提取感測器資料。流量流經網路負載平衡器 (NLB)，然後流向 Web 層的 Amazon EC2 實例，最後流向應用程式層的 EC2 執行個體。應用程式層呼叫資料庫。解決方案架構師應該如何提高傳輸中資料的安全性？
question_text.en: A company has a three-tier application on AWS that ingests sensor data from its users’ devices. The traffic flows through a Network Load Balancer (NLB), then to Amazon EC2 instances for the web tier, and finally to EC2 instances for the application tier. The application tier makes calls to a database. What should a solutions architect do to improve the security of the data in transit?

A.zh: 設定 TLS 偵聽器。在 NLB 上部署伺服器憑證。
A.en: Configure a TLS listener. Deploy the server certificate on the NLB.

B.zh: 配置 AWS Shield Advanced。在 NLB 上啟用 AWS WAF。
B.en: Configure AWS Shield Advanced. Enable AWS WAF on the NLB.

C.zh: 將負載平衡器變更為應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。在 ALB 上啟用 AWS WAF。
C.en: Change the load balancer to an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Enable AWS WAF on the ALB.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 加密 EC2 執行個體上的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區。
D.en: Encrypt the Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume on the EC2 instances by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).

A.zh: 正確。TLS（傳輸層安全）是一種在傳輸過程中加密資料的安全標準。在NLB上設定TLS監聽，並部署伺服器證書，確保資料在傳輸過程中加密，提高安全性。
A.en: Correct. TLS (Transport Layer Security) is a security standard for encrypting data during transmission. configures a TLS listener on NLB and deploys a server certificate to ensure that data is encrypted during transmission, thereby improving security.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Shield Advanced 和 AWS WAF 主要用於防範 DDoS 攻擊和應用層安全性問題，而不是直接用於加密資料傳輸。此選項與資料傳輸安全無關。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS Shield Advanced and AWS WAF are mainly used to protect against DDoS attacks and application layer security issues, rather than directly for encrypted data transmission. This option has nothing to do with data transmission security.

C.zh: 錯誤。儘管 ALB 支援 TLS 終止，但該問題不需要更改負載平衡器。另外，啟用AWS WAF主要是為了防止應用層攻擊，與資料傳輸加密無關。
C.en: Incorrect. Although ALB supports TLS termination, the question does not require changing the load balancer. In addition, enabling AWS WAF is mainly to prevent application layer attacks and has nothing to do with data transmission encryption.

D.zh: 錯誤。EBS加密用於保護儲存資料的安全，而不是傳輸資料的安全。此選項與問題所要求的「傳輸過程中資料的安全性」無關。
D.en: Incorrect. EBS encryption is used to protect the security of stored data, not the security of transmitted data. This option has nothing to do with the "security of data during transmission" required by the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 設定 TLS 偵聽器。在 NLB 上部署伺服器憑證。
answer_text.en: A. Configure a TLS listener. Deploy the server certificate on the NLB.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：TLS（傳輸層安全）是一種在傳輸過程中加密資料的安全標準。在NLB上設定TLS監聽，並部署伺服器證書，確保資料在傳輸過程中加密，提高安全性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: TLS (Transport Layer Security) is a security standard for encrypting data during transmission. configures a TLS listener on NLB and deploys a server certificate to ensure that data is encrypted during transmission, thereby improving security.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃將商業現成應用程式從其本地資料中心遷移到 AWS。該軟體具有使用套接字和核心的軟體許可模型，具有可預測的容量和正常運行時間要求。該公司希望使用今年稍早購買的現有許可證。哪種 Amazon EC2 定價選項最具成本效益？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a commercial off-the-shelf application from its on-premises data center to AWS. The software has a software licensing model using sockets and cores with predictable capacity and uptime requirements. The company wants to use its existing licenses, which were purchased earlier this year. Which Amazon EC2 pricing option is the MOST cost-effective?

A.zh: 專用保留主機
A.en: Dedicated Reserved Hosts

B.zh: 專用點播主機
B.en: Dedicated On-Demand Hosts

C.zh: 專用預留實例
C.en: Dedicated Reserved Instances

D.zh: 專用按需實例
D.en: Dedicated On-Demand Instances

A.zh: 正確。。專用預留主機允許使用者在專用主機上執行 EC2 實例，同時使用現有的基於套接字和核心的軟體授權。此選項提供了成本效益，因為它結合了專用主機的靈活性和預留實例的折扣。
A.en: Correct. . Dedicated Reserved Hosts allow users to run EC2 instances on dedicated hosts while using existing socket- and core-based software licenses. This option provides cost-effectiveness because it combines the flexibility of dedicated hosts with the discount of Reserved Instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。。雖然專用點播主機也支援使用現有的軟體許可證，但它是按需付費的，成本更高，而且不如保留選項划算。
B.en: Incorrect. . Although Dedicated On-Demand Hosts also supports the use of existing software licenses, it is pay-as-you-go, which is more expensive and not as cost-effective as the reserved option.

C.zh: 錯誤。。專用預留實例雖然提供預留折扣，但不支援基於套接字和基於核心的軟體授權模型。此選項適用於實例級許可，不適用於主機級許可。
C.en: Incorrect. . Dedicated Reserved Instances, while offering reservation discounts, do not support socket- and core-based software licensing models. This option applies to instance-level licensing, not host-level licensing.

D.zh: 錯誤。。專用按需實例是按需付費的，成本較高，並且不支援基於套接字和基於核心的軟體授權模型。
D.en: Incorrect. . Dedicated On-Demand Instances are pay-as-you-go, cost more, and do not support socket- and core-based software licensing models.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (92%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。專用預留主機允許使用者在專用主機上執行 EC2 實例，同時使用現有的基於套接字和核心的軟體授權。此選項提供了成本效益，因為它結合了專用主機的靈活性和預留實例的折扣。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (92%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . Dedicated Reserved Hosts allow users to run EC2 instances on dedicated hosts while using existing socket- and core-based software licenses. This option provides cost-effectiveness because it combines the flexibility of dedicated hosts with the discount of Reserved Instances.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在跨多個可用區的 Amazon EC2 Linux 執行個體上執行應用程式。應用程式需要一個高度可用且相容於可移植作業系統介面 (POSIX) 的儲存層。儲存層必須提供最大的資料持久性，並且必須可在 EC2 執行個體之間共用。儲存層的資料在前30天會被頻繁訪問，之後將不再被頻繁訪問。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an application on Amazon EC2 Linux instances across multiple Availability Zones. The application needs a storage layer that is highly available and Portable Operating System Interface (POSIX)-compliant. The storage layer must provide maximum data durability and must be shareable across the EC2 instances. The data in the storage layer will be accessed frequently for the first 30 days and will be accessed infrequently after that time. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 標準儲存類別。建立 S3 生命週期策略以將不經常存取的資料移至 S3 Glacier。
A.en: Use the Amazon S3 Standard storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move infrequently accessed data to S3 Glacier.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 標準儲存類別。建立 S3 生命週期策略以將不經常存取的資料移至 S3 標準-不頻繁存取（S3 標準-IA）。
B.en: Use the Amazon S3 Standard storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to move infrequently accessed data to S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA).

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 標準儲存類別。建立生命週期管理策略，將不經常存取的資料移至 EFS 標準-不頻繁存取 (EFS 標準-IA)。
C.en: Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard storage class. Create a lifecycle management policy to move infrequently accessed data to EFS Standard-Infrequent Access (EFS Standard-IA).

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone 儲存類別。建立生命週期管理策略，將不常存取的資料移至 EFS One Zone-Infrequent Access (EFS One Zone-IA)。
D.en: Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone storage class. Create a lifecycle management policy to move infrequently accessed data to EFS One Zone-Infrequent Access (EFS One Zone-IA).

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 標準儲存類別並建立生命週期策略以將資料移至 S3 Glacier：Amazon S3 是物件存儲，而不是符合 POSIX 的檔案存儲，因此不滿足問題要求。 S3 Glacier 適合長期存儲，但不適合頻繁存取的資料。不符合 POSIX 相容性和共用檔案格式要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use the Amazon S3 Standard storage class and create a lifecycle policy to move data to S3 Glacier: Amazon S3 is an object store, not a POSIX-compliant file store, and therefore does not meet the question requirements. S3 Glacier is suitable for long-term storage, but is not suitable for frequently accessed data. POSIX compatibility and shared file format requirements are not met.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 Standard 儲存類別並建立生命週期策略以將資料移至 S3 Standard-IA：Amazon S3 Standard-IA 提供較低的儲存成本，但仍是物件存儲，而不是符合 POSIX 的檔案儲存。不符合 POSIX 相容性和共用檔案格式要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Use the Amazon S3 Standard storage class and create a lifecycle policy to move data to S3 Standard-IA: Amazon S3 Standard-IA offers lower storage costs, but is still an object store, not a POSIX-compliant file store. POSIX compatibility and shared file format requirements are not met.

C.zh: 正確。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 標準儲存類別並建立生命週期管理策略以將資料移至 EFS Standard-IA：Amazon EFS 是符合 POSIX 標準的檔案存儲，支援跨多個 EC2 執行個體共用。 EFS Standard-IA 儲存成本較低，適合不經常存取的資料。滿足產權要求的高可用性、資料持久性和成本效益。滿足所有問題要求。
C.en: Correct. Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard storage class and create lifecycle management policies to move data to EFS Standard-IA: Amazon EFS is a POSIX-compliant file store that supports sharing across multiple EC2 instances. EFS Standard-IA provides lower storage costs and is suitable for data that is not frequently accessed. High availability, data durability, and cost-effectiveness that meet title requirements. Meets all question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone 儲存類別並建立生命週期管理策略以將資料移至 EFS One Zone-IA：EFS One Zone 儲存類別不提供跨多個可用區的高可用性。雖然成本較低，但是並不能滿足問題所要求的高可用性。錯誤原因：不符合高可用要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) One Zone storage class and create a lifecycle management policy to move data to EFS One Zone-IA: The EFS One Zone storage class does not provide high availability across multiple Availability Zones. Although the cost is lower, it does not meet the high availability required by the question. Error reason: High availability requirements are not met.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 標準儲存類別。建立生命週期管理策略，將不經常存取的資料移至 EFS 標準-不頻繁存取 (EFS 標準-IA)。
answer_text.en: C. Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard storage class. Create a lifecycle management policy to move infrequently accessed data to EFS Standard-Infrequent Access (EFS Standard-IA).

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (93%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 標準儲存類別並建立生命週期管理策略以將資料移至 EFS Standard-IA：Amazon EFS 是符合 POSIX 標準的檔案存儲，支援跨多個 EC2 執行個體共用。 EFS Standard-IA 儲存成本較低，適合不經常存取的資料。滿足產權要求的高可用性、資料持久性和成本效益。滿足所有問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (93%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use the Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) Standard storage class and create lifecycle management policies to move data to EFS Standard-IA: Amazon EFS is a POSIX-compliant file store that supports sharing across multiple EC2 instances. EFS Standard-IA provides lower storage costs and is suitable for data that is not frequently accessed. High availability, data durability, and cost-effectiveness that meet title requirements. Meets all question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在創建新的 VPC 設計。有兩個用於負載平衡器的公有子網路、兩個用於 Web 伺服器的私有子網路和兩個用於 MySQL 的私有子網路。 Web 伺服器僅使用 HTTPS。解決方案架構師已經為負載平衡器建立了一個安全性群組，允許來自 0.0.0.0/0 的連接埠 443。公司政策要求每個資源具有仍能夠執行其任務所需的最少存取權限。解決方案架構師應該使用哪種附加配置策略來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is creating a new VPC design. There are two public subnets for the load balancer, two private subnets for web servers, and two private subnets for MySQL. The web servers use only HTTPS. The solutions architect has already created a security group for the load balancer allowing port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0. Company policy requires that each resource has the least access required to still be able to perform its tasks. Which additional configuration strategy should the solutions architect use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 為 Web 伺服器建立安全群組並允許來自 0.0.0.0/0 的連接埠 443。為 MySQL 伺服器建立安全性群組，並允許 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306。
A.en: Create a security group for the web servers and allow port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0. Create a security group for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

B.zh: 為 Web 伺服器建立網路 ACL，並允許來自 0.0.0.0/0 的連接埠 443。為 MySQL 伺服器建立網路 ACL，並允許來自 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306。
B.en: Create a network ACL for the web servers and allow port 443 from 0.0.0.0/0. Create a network ACL for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

C.zh: 為 Web 伺服器建立安全性群組並允許來自負載平衡器的連接埠 443。為 MySQL 伺服器建立安全性群組，並允許 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306。
C.en: Create a security group for the web servers and allow port 443 from the load balancer. Create a security group for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

D.zh: 為 Web 伺服器建立網路 ACL 並允許來自負載平衡器的連接埠 443。為 MySQL 伺服器建立網路 ACL，並允許來自 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306。
D.en: Create a network ACL for the web servers and allow port 443 from the load balancer. Create a network ACL for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

A.zh: 錯誤。允許從 0.0.0.0/0 存取連接埠 443 違反了最小權限原則，因為 Web 伺服器只需要接收來自負載平衡器的流量，而不是所有來源的流量。為 MySQL 伺服器建立安全性群組並允許 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306 是正確的設定。
A.en: Incorrect. Allowing port 443 access from 0.0.0.0/0 violates the principle of least privilege because the web server only needs to receive traffic from the load balancer, not all sources. Creating a security group for the MySQL server and allowing port 3306 from the web server security group is the correct configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。網路ACL是無狀態的，無法根據安全群組等資源之間的關係提供細微的控制。這個問題需要基於最小權限原則，安全群組比較適合。允許從 0.0.0.0/0 存取連接埠 443 違反了最小權限原則。
B.en: Incorrect. Network ACL is stateless and cannot provide fine-grained control based on the relationship between resources like security groups. This question requires based on the principle of least privilege, and security groups are more suitable. Allowing port 443 access from 0.0.0.0/0 violates the principle of least privilege.

C.zh: 正確。為網路伺服器建立安全性群組並允許負載平衡器存取443連接埠符合最小權限原則，因為網路伺服器只需要接收來自負載平衡器的流量。為 MySQL 伺服器建立安全性群組並允許 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306 是正確的設定。
C.en: Correct. Creating a security group for the web server and allowing port 443 access from the load balancer complies with the principle of least privilege because the web server only needs to receive traffic from the load balancer. Creating a security group for the MySQL server and allowing port 3306 from the web server security group is the correct configuration.

D.zh: 錯誤。網路ACL是無狀態的，無法根據安全群組等資源之間的關係提供細微的控制。儘管允許從負載平衡器存取連接埠 443 是正確的，但使用網路 ACL 不符合問題所需的最小權限原則。
D.en: Incorrect. Network ACL is stateless and cannot provide fine-grained control based on the relationship between resources like security groups. Although it is correct to allow port 443 access from the load balancer, using a network ACL does not comply with the principle of least privilege required by the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 為 Web 伺服器建立安全性群組並允許來自負載平衡器的連接埠 443。為 MySQL 伺服器建立安全性群組，並允許 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306。
answer_text.en: C. Create a security group for the web servers and allow port 443 from the load balancer. Create a security group for the MySQL servers and allow port 3306 from the web servers security group.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：為網路伺服器建立安全性群組並允許負載平衡器存取443連接埠符合最小權限原則，因為網路伺服器只需要接收來自負載平衡器的流量。為 MySQL 伺服器建立安全性群組並允許 Web 伺服器安全群組的連接埠 3306 是正確的設定。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Creating a security group for the web server and allowing port 443 access from the load balancer complies with the principle of least privilege because the web server only needs to receive traffic from the load balancer. Creating a security group for the MySQL server and allowing port 3306 from the web server security group is the correct configuration.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司正在 AWS 上執行多層應用程式。前端層和後端層均在 Amazon EC2 上運行，資料庫在 Amazon RDS for MySQL 上運行。後端層與 RDS 實例通訊。頻繁地呼叫從資料庫傳回相同的資料集會導致效能下降。應該採取哪些措施來提高後端的效能？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company is running a multi-tier application on AWS. The front-end and backend tiers both run on Amazon EC2, and the database runs on Amazon RDS for MySQL. The backend tier communicates with the RDS instance. There are frequent calls to return identical datasets from the database that are causing performance slowdowns. Which action should be taken to improve the performance of the backend?

A.zh: 實作 Amazon SNS 來儲存資料庫呼叫。
A.en: Implement Amazon SNS to store the database calls.

B.zh: 實作 Amazon ElastiCache 來快取大型資料集。
B.en: Implement Amazon ElastiCache to cache the large datasets.

C.zh: 實作 RDS for MySQL 唯讀副本來快取資料庫呼叫。
C.en: Implement an RDS for MySQL read replica to cache database calls.

D.zh: 實作 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 以將呼叫串流傳輸到資料庫。
D.en: Implement Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to stream the calls to the database.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon SNS 是用於傳送/訂閱訊息的訊息服務，適用於事件通知情境。不適合優化資料庫查詢，也無法解決重複查詢帶來的效能問題。與問題的要求不符。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon SNS is a messaging service used to send/subscribe messages and is suitable for event notification scenarios. It is not suitable for optimizing database queries, nor can it solve performance problems caused by repeated queries. It does not match the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon ElastiCache 是一項內部快取服務，支援 Redis 和 Memcached，專門用於快取經常存取的資料。透過緩衝重複查詢的數據，可以顯著減少資料庫負載並提高效能。完全滿足問題的要求，能夠有效解決效能問題。
B.en: Correct. Amazon ElastiCache is an internal caching service that supports Redis and Memcached and is specifically used to cache frequently accessed data. By buffering repetitively queried data, you can significantly reduce database load and improve performance. It fully meets the requirements of the question and can effectively solve the performance problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。RDS只讀副本用於分擔主庫的讀取負載，但它不是緩衝機制。雖然唯讀副本可以提高讀取效能，但無法解決重複查詢的問題，因為每次查詢仍然需要存取資料庫。重複查詢帶來的效能問題無法有效解決。
C.en: Incorrect. RDS read replica is used to share the read load of the primary database, but it is not a buffering mechanism. Although read replicas can improve read performance, they cannot solve the problem of repeated queries because each query still requires access to the database. The performance problem caused by repeated queries cannot be effectively solved.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 是一種用於即時資料傳輸和處理的串流資料服務。它適合處理流數據，但與優化資料庫查詢無關。與問題的要求不符。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose is a streaming data service for real-time data transmission and processing. It is suitable for processing streaming data, but has nothing to do with optimizing database queries. It does not match the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 實作 Amazon ElastiCache 來快取大型資料集。
answer_text.en: B. Implement Amazon ElastiCache to cache the large datasets.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ElastiCache 是一項內部快取服務，支援 Redis 和 Memcached，專門用於快取經常存取的資料。透過緩衝重複查詢的數據，可以顯著減少資料庫負載並提高效能。完全滿足問題的要求，能夠有效解決效能問題。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ElastiCache is an internal caching service that supports Redis and Memcached and is specifically used to cache frequently accessed data. By buffering repetitively queried data, you can significantly reduce database load and improve performance. It fully meets the requirements of the question and can effectively solve the performance problem.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一名新員工加入公司，擔任部署工程師。部署工程師將使用 AWS CloudFormation 範本建立多個 AWS 資源。解決方案架構師希望部署工程師在遵循最小特權原則的同時執行工作活動。解決方案架構師應該採取哪些行動組合來實現這個目標？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A new employee has joined a company as a deployment engineer. The deployment engineer will be using AWS CloudFormation templates to create multiple AWS resources. A solutions architect wants the deployment engineer to perform job activities while following the principle of least privilege. Which combination of actions should the solutions architect take to accomplish this goal? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 讓部署工程師使用 AWS 帳戶根使用者憑證來執行 AWS CloudFormation 堆疊操作。
A.en: Have the deployment engineer use AWS account root user credentials for performing AWS CloudFormation stack operations.

B.zh: 為部署工程師建立一個新的 IAM 用戶，並將該 IAM 用戶新增至附加了 PowerUsers IAM 策略的群組。
B.en: Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has the PowerUsers IAM policy attached.

C.zh: 為部署工程師建立一個新的 IAM 用戶，並將該 IAM 用戶新增至附加了 AdministratorAccess IAM 策略的群組。
C.en: Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has the AdministratorAccess IAM policy attached.

D.zh: 為部署工程師建立一個新的 IAM 用戶，並將該 IAM 用戶新增至具有僅允許 AWS CloudFormation 操作的 IAM 政策的群組。
D.en: Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has an IAM policy that allows AWS CloudFormation actions only.

E.zh: 為部署工程師建立 IAM 角色，以明確定義特定於 AWS CloudFormation 堆疊的權限並使用該 IAM 角色啟動堆疊。
E.en: Create an IAM role for the deployment engineer to explicitly define the permissions specific to the AWS CloudFormation stack and launch stacks using that IAM role.

A.zh: 錯誤。root使用者權限過高，違反了「最小權限原則」。 root 使用者僅應用於帳戶管理或緊急情況，不應用於日常操作。
A.en: Incorrect. The root user has too high permissions and violates the "principle of least privileges". The root user should be used only for account management or emergencies and should not be used for daily operations.

B.zh: 錯誤。PowerUsers 政策允許使用者管理資源，但不允許管理 IAM 權限。這可能會授予太多權限，但仍然違反「最小權限原則」。
B.en: Incorrect. The PowerUsers policy allows users to manage resources but not IAM permissions. This may grant too many permissions and still violate the "principle of least privilege.".

C.zh: 錯誤。AdministratorAccess策略授予完全權限，遠遠超出CloudFormation操作所需的權限，違反了「最小權限原則」。
C.en: Incorrect. The AdministratorAccess policy grants full permissions, which far exceeds the permissions required for CloudFormation operations, violating the "principle of least privileges".

D.zh: 正確。此選項符合「最小權限原則」，僅授予CloudFormation相關操作權限，限制了使用者權限範圍。
D.en: Correct. this option complies with the "principle of least privilege" and only grants CloudFormation-related operation permissions, limiting the scope of user permissions.

E.zh: 正確。使用IAM角色可以清楚定義權限，需要時可以暫時使用角色，進一步增強安全性和權限控制。
E.en: Correct. Permissions can be clearly defined using IAM roles, and roles can be used temporarily when needed to further enhance security and permission control.

answer_text.zh: D. 為部署工程師建立一個新的 IAM 用戶，並將該 IAM 用戶新增至具有僅允許 AWS CloudFormation 操作的 IAM 政策的群組。；E. 為部署工程師建立 IAM 角色，以明確定義特定於 AWS CloudFormation 堆疊的權限並使用該 IAM 角色啟動堆疊。
answer_text.en: D. Create a new IAM user for the deployment engineer and add the IAM user to a group that has an IAM policy that allows AWS CloudFormation actions only.; E. Create an IAM role for the deployment engineer to explicitly define the permissions specific to the AWS CloudFormation stack and launch stacks using that IAM role.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：DE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項符合「最小權限原則」，僅授予CloudFormation相關操作權限，限制了使用者權限範圍。；使用IAM角色可以清楚定義權限，需要時可以暫時使用角色，進一步增強安全性和權限控制。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: DE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: this option complies with the "principle of least privilege" and only grants CloudFormation-related operation permissions, limiting the scope of user permissions.; Permissions can be clearly defined using IAM roles, and roles can be used temporarily when needed to further enhance security and permission control.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 VPC 部署兩層 Web 應用程式。 Web 層使用具有跨多個可用區的公有子網路的 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組。資料庫層由位於不同私有子網路中的 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體所組成。 Web 層需要存取資料庫來檢索產品資訊。 Web 應用程式未如預期運作。 Web 應用程式報表無法連線到資料庫。資料庫已確認已啟動並正在運行。網路 ACL、安全性群組和路由表的所有設定仍處於預設狀態。解決方案架構師應該建議什麼來修復應用程式？
question_text.en: A company is deploying a two-tier web application in a VPC. The web tier is using an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with public subnets that span multiple Availability Zones. The database tier consists of an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance in separate private subnets. The web tier requires access to the database to retrieve product information. The web application is not working as intended. The web application reports that it cannot connect to the database. The database is confirmed to be up and running. All configurations for the network ACLs, security groups, and route tables are still in their default states. What should a solutions architect recommend to fix the application?

A.zh: 在私有子網路的網路 ACL 中新增明確規則，以允許來自 Web 層 EC2 執行個體的流量。
A.en: Add an explicit rule to the private subnet’s network ACL to allow traffic from the web tier’s EC2 instances.

B.zh: 在 VPC 路由表中新增一條路由，以允許 Web 層的 EC2 執行個體和資料庫層之間的流量。
B.en: Add a route in the VPC route table to allow traffic between the web tier’s EC2 instances and the database tier.

C.zh: 將 Web 層的 EC2 執行個體和資料庫層的 RDS 執行個體部署到兩個單獨的 VPC 中，並配置 VPC 對等互連。
C.en: Deploy the web tier's EC2 instances and the database tier’s RDS instance into two separate VPCs, and configure VPC peering.

D.zh: 將入站規則新增至資料庫層 RDS 執行個體的安全性群組，以允許來自 Web 層安全性群組的流量。
D.en: Add an inbound rule to the security group of the database tier’s RDS instance to allow traffic from the web tiers security group.

A.zh: 錯誤。網路 ACL 是無狀態的，預設允許所有流量進出。問題明確指出網路ACL仍處於預設狀態，因此無需新增明確規則。
A.en: Incorrect. Network ACLs are stateless and allow all traffic in and out by default. The question clearly states that the network ACL is still in the default state, so there is no need to add explicit rules.

B.zh: 錯誤。VPC 路由表用於定義子網路之間的流量路由。問題沒有提到路由表配置問題，同一個VPC內的子網路已經預設可以互通了。
B.en: Incorrect. The VPC routing table is used to define traffic routes between subnets. The question does not mention routing table configuration issues, and subnets in the same VPC can already communicate with each other by default.

C.zh: 錯誤。問題明確指出Web層和資料庫層在同一個VPC中，因此不需要使用VPC Peering。
C.en: Incorrect. The question clearly states that the web layer and database layer are in the same VPC, so there is no need to use VPC Peering.

D.zh: 正確。安全群組是有狀態的，預設僅允許來自自身的流量。 Web層的EC2實例需要存取資料庫層的RDS實例，因此需要在RDS實例的安全性群組中新增入站規則，以允許來自Web層安全性群組的流量。
D.en: Correct. Security groups are stateful and only allow traffic from themselves by default. The EC2 instance in the web layer needs to access the RDS instance in the database layer, so you need to add inbound rules to the security group of the RDS instance to allow traffic from the web layer security group.

answer_text.zh: D. 將入站規則新增至資料庫層 RDS 執行個體的安全性群組，以允許來自 Web 層安全性群組的流量。
answer_text.en: D. Add an inbound rule to the security group of the database tier’s RDS instance to allow traffic from the web tiers security group.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (97%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：安全群組是有狀態的，預設僅允許來自自身的流量。 Web層的EC2實例需要存取資料庫層的RDS實例，因此需要在RDS實例的安全性群組中新增入站規則，以允許來自Web層安全性群組的流量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (97%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Security groups are stateful and only allow traffic from themselves by default. The EC2 instance in the web layer needs to access the RDS instance in the database layer, so you need to add inbound rules to the security group of the RDS instance to allow traffic from the web layer security group.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將其線上廣告業務的大型資料集儲存在單一可用區的 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體中。該公司希望運行業務報告查詢而不影響對生產資料庫實例的寫入操作。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a large dataset for its online advertising business stored in an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance in a single Availability Zone. The company wants business reporting queries to run without impacting the write operations to the production DB instance. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 部署 RDS 唯讀副本來處理業務報告查詢。
A.en: Deploy RDS read replicas to process the business reporting queries.

B.zh: 透過將資料庫執行個體放置在彈性負載平衡器後面來水平擴展資料庫執行個體。
B.en: Scale out the DB instance horizontally by placing it behind an Elastic Load Balancer.

C.zh: 將資料庫實例擴展到更大的實例類型以處理寫入操作和查詢。
C.en: Scale up the DB instance to a larger instance type to handle write operations and queries.

D.zh: 在多個可用區中部署資料庫執行個體以處理業務報表查詢。
D.en: Deploy the DB instance in multiple Availability Zones to process the business reporting queries.

A.zh: 正確。RDS唯讀副本允許將讀取操作分離到副本以減少主資料庫的負載。這是解決讀寫分離問題的建議方式。滿足題目要求：讀取副本不會影響主庫的寫入操作。
A.en: Correct. RDS read replicas allow read operations to be separated to replicas to reduce the load on the primary database. This is the recommended way to solve the read-write separation problem. Meets the question requirements: Reading the replica will not affect the write operations of the primary database.

B.zh: 錯誤。RDS 執行個體不能直接放置在彈性負載平衡器後面。 ELB主要用於將流量分發到多個EC2實例，而不是資料庫實例。不符合題目要求：此選項與資料庫讀寫分離無關。
B.en: Incorrect. RDS instances cannot be placed directly behind an Elastic Load Balancer. ELB is mainly used to distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances, not database instances. Does not meet the question requirements: This option has nothing to do with database read and write separation.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然擴展到更大的實例大小可以提高效能，但它並不能解決讀寫分離的問題。業務報告查詢仍然會影響寫入操作。這不符合要求，因為題目明確要求避免影響寫入操作。
C.en: Incorrect. While scaling to larger instance sizes can improve performance, it does not solve the problem of read-write separation. Business reporting queries will still affect write operations. This does not meet the requirement because the question clearly requires that it avoid affecting the writing operation.

D.zh: 錯誤。多個可用區主要用於提高資料庫的高可用性，並沒有優化讀寫分離。此選項不符合要求，因為它無法解決讀取操作對寫入操作的影響。
D.en: Incorrect. Multiple availability zones are mainly used to improve the high availability of the database and do not optimize read and write separation. This option does not meet the requirement because it cannot solve the impact of read operations on write operations.

answer_text.zh: A. 部署 RDS 唯讀副本來處理業務報告查詢。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy RDS read replicas to process the business reporting queries.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：RDS唯讀副本允許將讀取操作分離到副本以減少主資料庫的負載。這是解決讀寫分離問題的建議方式。滿足題目要求：讀取副本不會影響主庫的寫入操作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: RDS read replicas allow read operations to be separated to replicas to reduce the load on the primary database. This is the recommended way to solve the read-write separation problem. Meets the question requirements: Reading the replica will not affect the write operations of the primary database.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在一組 Amazon EC2 執行個體上託管一個三層電子商務應用程式。這些執行個體在應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中執行。所有電子商務資料都儲存在 Amazon RDS for MariaDB 多可用區資料庫執行個體中。該公司希望優化交易期間的客戶會話管理。應用程式必須持久儲存會話資料。哪些解決方案可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company hosts a three-tier ecommerce application on a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). All ecommerce data is stored in an Amazon RDS for MariaDB Multi-AZ DB instance. The company wants to optimize customer session management during transactions. The application must store session data durably. Which solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 開啟 ALB 上的黏性會話功能（會話親和性）。
A.en: Turn on the sticky sessions feature (session affinity) on the ALB.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 表格儲存客戶會話資訊。
B.en: Use an Amazon DynamoDB table to store customer session information.

C.zh: 部署 Amazon Cognito 使用者池來管理使用者會話資訊。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon Cognito user pool to manage user session information.

D.zh: 部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集來儲存客戶會話資訊。
D.en: Deploy an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to store customer session information.

E.zh: 在應用程式中使用 AWS Systems Manager Application Manager 來管理使用者會話資訊。
E.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Application Manager in the application to manage user session information.

A.zh: 正確。啟用ALB的會話功能可以將使用者請求指派給特定的EC2實例，實現會話管理。但這種方法不持久，無法滿足「會話資料持久化儲存」的要求。
A.en: Correct. Enabling the session function of ALB can assign user requests to specific EC2 instances to achieve session management. However, this method is not durable and cannot meet the requirement of "persistent storage of session data".

B.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB 是一種持久性儲存解決方案，可儲存會話資料並提供高可用性和低延遲。然而，它並不是專門為會話管理而設計的，可能需要額外的開發工作來實現會話管理功能。
B.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB is a durable storage solution that can store session data and provide high availability and low latency. However, it is not specifically designed for session management and may require additional development work to implement session management functionality.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Cognito 主要用於使用者身份驗證和授權，而不是會話資料的持久性儲存。它不適合接收用於管理帳戶的交易會話資料。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon Cognito is mainly used for user authentication and authorization, and is not a persistent storage of session data. It is not suitable for receiving transaction session data used to manage accounts.

D.zh: 正確。ElastiCache for Redis 是一種高效能內部儲存解決方案，非常適合儲存會話資料。它支援持久化，可以快速存取數據，滿足會話管理的需求。
D.en: Correct. ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance internal storage solution that is very suitable for storing session data. It supports persistence and can quickly access data to meet the needs of session management.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 應用程式管理器主要用於管理應用程式生命週期，而不是會話資料的儲存管理。
E.en: Incorrect. AWS Systems Manager Application Manager is mainly used to manage the application life cycle, not the storage management of session data.

answer_text.zh: A. 開啟 ALB 上的黏性會話功能（會話親和性）。；D. 部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集來儲存客戶會話資訊。
answer_text.en: A. Turn on the sticky sessions feature (session affinity) on the ALB.; D. Deploy an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to store customer session information.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (38%)； BD (33%)； AB (28%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：啟用ALB的會話功能可以將使用者請求指派給特定的EC2實例，實現會話管理。但這種方法不持久，無法滿足「會話資料持久化儲存」的要求。；ElastiCache for Redis 是一種高效能內部儲存解決方案，非常適合儲存會話資料。它支援持久化，可以快速存取數據，滿足會話管理的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (38%); BD (33%); AB (28%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Enabling the session function of ALB can assign user requests to specific EC2 instances to achieve session management. However, this method is not durable and cannot meet the requirement of "persistent storage of session data".; ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance internal storage solution that is very suitable for storing session data. It supports persistence and can quickly access data to meet the needs of session management.
